tngFinancing.summary: Pre-approved emergency working capital, auto-repaid from your daily TNG eWallet sales.
tnc: Approved amount terus pergi ke checkout. Guna untuk pembelian supply ni je.
Flat fee 1.5% atas approved amount. Tiada processing fee.
Tenure 30 hari. Repayment auto-deduct 5% daripada jualan harian TNG eWallet sampai habis.
Boleh settle awal bila-bila masa. No early settlement fee.
Lepas 30 hari, late charge 1% sebulan atas baki tertunggak.
SOS Credit disediakan oleh TNG Digital Sdn Bhd untuk merchant TNG eWallet pre-approved.
